case_title: KRYSTAL MIZZI VS. CRAIG DANIELS (DBA) HAPPY GO HOUNDS

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIZZI, KRYSTAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIZZI, KRYSTAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAIG DANIELS (DBA) HAPPY GO HOUNDS $5,668.50 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,743.50, JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF KRYSTAL MIZZI AND AGAINST DEFENDANT CRAIG DBA HAPPY GO HOUNDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,743.45 FILED BY MIZZI, KRYSTAL AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIG DANIELS (DBA) HAPPY GO HOUNDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-30-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF KRYSTAL MIZZI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: 0.00 SERVED JUN-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIG DANIELS (DBA) HAPPY GO HOUNDS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF KRYSTAL MIZZI APPEARED. DEFENDANT CRAIG DANIELS DBA HAPPY GO HOUNDS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
